top_signals.title: Despite Vessel Attacks, Oil, LNG Loadings Proceeds in Middle East
top_signals.summary: Middle East producers are pushing ahead with loading oil and liquefied natural gas despite fresh ship attacks in the Strait of Hormuz and renewed strikes between the U.S. and Iran in recent days, shipping data showed.Energy shipping in the strait…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Framework Deal
top_signals.summary: Israel, Lebanon, and the US reached an initial trilateral framework agreement aimed at paving the way for ending the conflict between Israel and Lebanon and ultimately reaching a peace settlement. Bloomberg's Dan Williams reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
top_signals.summary: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
top_signals.summary: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.
